title: boechera calcarea
intro: Boechera calcarea, also known as calcicola rock cress, is a perennial plant species within the family Brassicaceae, native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Boechera calcarea include its potential to alleviate digestive issues and reduce symptoms of arthritis, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. Boechera calcarea can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in human use.
